title: selaginella subserpentina
intro: Selaginella subserpentina, also known as Khas or Khas-khas, is a type of spore-producing, vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. Traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, Selaginella subserpentina has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu. In herbal preparations, Selaginella subserpentina is often used in the form of powder, decoction, or extract, and is typically consumed orally or used topically to relieve various health conditions.
